reasoning: The FRED tool estimates a combined probability of 0.58 based on a positive overall 1-year linear trend, but closer inspection shows the recent trend is downward (Sep: 2.80, Oct: 2.73, Nov: 2.70). For the longer horizon (2026-02-21), standard forecasting calls for moving uncertainty closer to 50%, so I estimate 48% for the second resolution date.
